direction_rows.reason: The local role surface is correct and should not be widened further until harmonization is solved.
No non-core BK0480 name currently has same-plane support, so wider control math would be semantically dirty.
Replay remains blocked until the board has a cleaner non-core evidence base inside the same plane.
BK0480 now needs evidence harmonization, not further role speculation.

interpretation: V1.30D freezes BK0480 after local expansion because harmonization, not role discovery, is now the binding constraint.
The board should gather more same-plane evidence before any replay unlock attempt.
